summary: Completed testing of @mention feature, pastel gradient cards, and Topics dropdown updates for Blogs4Blocks. All features working correctly: user search API, @mention autocomplete in comments, mention highlighting, pastel gradient fills on category/blog cards, Topics dropdown with off-white background and colored dots.
passed_tests: GET /api/users/search?q=A returns users starting with 'A' - PASS
GET /api/users/search?q=A&post_id=<id> prioritizes post author/commenters - PASS
GET /api/users/search with empty query returns empty list - PASS
GET /api/users/search respects limit parameter - PASS
POST /api/posts/{id}/comments with @mention stores mentions field - PASS
GET /api/posts/{id}/comments returns comments with mentions - PASS
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works (regression) - PASS
POST /api/newsletter/unsubscribe works (regression) - PASS
GET /api/admin/stats works for admin users (regression) - PASS
GET /api/admin/digest-status works (regression) - PASS
GET /api/stats public endpoint works - PASS
Homepage loads with pastel gradient category cards (rounded-xl) - PASS
Category cards have linear-gradient background fills - PASS
Blog cards have pastel gradient fills matching category color - PASS
Blog cards show stats at bottom (likes, views, time ago) - PASS
Topics dropdown has off-white background (#FDFCF8) - PASS
Topics dropdown shows category-colored dots - PASS
Comment form shows 'Type @ to mention' hint text - PASS
@mention popup appears when typing '@' in comment textarea - PASS
@mention popup shows users with name and city - PASS
Selecting mention from popup inserts @Name into textarea - PASS
@mentions in comments are highlighted in blue (#3D6B8E) with light background - PASS
How-to card visible on homepage - PASS
Analytics/stats card visible on homepage - PASS
Newsletter section visible on homepage - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: User search API correctly implements prefix search with post_id prioritization
@mention extraction uses regex to find mentions and stores user IDs in 'mentions' field
Comment rendering correctly highlights @mentions with blue text and light background
Pastel gradient colors defined in /utils/colors.js with cardFrom/cardTo properties
Topics dropdown uses getCategoryColor() for colored indicator dots
seed_data_creation: Created test comment with @Admin User mention for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three requested features verified: 1) @mention autocomplete in comments - type @ to search users, select to insert, mentions highlighted in blue. 2) Topics dropdown has off-white background (#FDFCF8) with category-colored dots. 3) Category and blog cards have full pastel gradient fills with rounded-xl corners. Analytics/newsletter endpoints still working (regression verified).

mention_feature.autocomplete_popup: Appears when typing @ in comment textarea
mention_feature.mention_highlighting: Blue text (#3D6B8E) with light blue background (10% opacity)
mention_feature.mention_storage: Mentions extracted and stored in comment.mentions array

topics_dropdown.colored_dots: Each category has colored dot using getCategoryColor()

pastel_gradient_cards.blog_cards: Same gradient pattern with category-specific colors
